{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Nightflame Spirit-lamp
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Nightflame Spirit-lamp]] is a black lantern that gathers fire-aspect [[vital aura]] during the day to sprout a flame at sunset.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
